key_decisions_and_rationale: Omni runtime should reuse scripts/helpers directly, not call a Codex skill. The existing Nano Banana and Veo runtime pattern is native-media job submission -> gateway adapter -> fixed wrapper script -> scheduler -> verified .native-media asset import.

The Omni skill is still useful as documentation and reusable operator knowledge. The app integration should copy/adapt the working /home/k8r1m/merlin/bin/genai-omni contract into repo-local native-media-gateway code after tests finish.
A narrow omniVideoProvider.js is likely cleaner than widening Veo-specific vertexVideoProvider.js unless Omni truly shares the same validation and CLI flags.
Batch delete should be implemented as frontend selection state over the existing DELETE /api/native-media/v1/library/:jobId flow; no backend batch API is needed for V1.

Generated image -> Image Studio and Video Studio reference should reuse existing uploadedImageUrls/input state and same-origin native asset URL validation; no generated video references in this branch.

Last-frame V1 should be a deterministic server-side extraction helper plus streamed PNG download. Auto-importing frames into Uploads or prompt inputs is deferred until the Uploads/sidebar feature exists.

Naming V1 should persist a user-facing download/display basename on job metadata rather than renaming asset files. This keeps storage simple while enabling future library/reference/project display names.
Do not add projects, references, characters, collection pages, prompt templates, uploads sidebar, or bulk add-to-project/reference in Omni V1.
issues_discovered: Graphify query was weak for high-level provider discovery, so narrow rg/sed/nl tracing was used after refreshing the graph.

The repo has an older src/components studio tree, but active /studio uses components/StandaloneShell.js importing ImageStudio and VideoStudio from the studio package; first-branch UI work should target packages/studio.
Last-frame old plan had a heavier response option that could mint a temp asset URL. V1 is now narrowed to direct streamed PNG attachment.

Per-studio naming is not currently present in server metadata. Download-only browser naming would not satisfy Karim's future reference/project display need, so V1 needs a minimal durable metadata field.
The working Omni wrapper currently lives under /home/k8r1m/merlin/bin/genai-omni. OGAI systemd integration should not depend on that external path long-term.
Two old untracked sidecar files remain in codex-handoffs/ from earlier sessions: .turns-019f1962 and .turns-019f1a2e.
